scripts.deploy: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test && devvit upload
scripts.launch: npm run release:check-clean && npm run deploy && devvit publish --version $npm_package_version && npm run release:tag && npm run release:push-tag && npm run release:github
scripts.release:check-clean: node -e "const {execSync}=require('node:child_process'); const s=execSync('git status --porcelain',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); if(s){console.error('Working tree must be clean before release:\n'+s); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.release:github: gh release create v$npm_package_version --title "CampaignLens v$npm_package_version" --notes-file docs/release-v$npm_package_version.md --verify-tag
scripts.release:git: npm run release:check-clean && npm run release:tag && npm run release:push-tag && npm run release:github
